# NOW

## Goal
<!-- token-budget: 120 -->
Turn the offline macro-shock evidence pack into an A-share beneficiary chain map.

## Current State
<!-- token-budget: 180 -->
- The wrapper already supports worker and verifier entry scripts.
- Structured verifier mode is available for machine-readable review output.
- The current reliability suite already covers the Jenny feedback workflow pack.

## Confirmed Facts
<!-- token-budget: 180 -->
- This task is an event-driven equity-research judgment task.
- The output needs chain-position classification instead of pure price-action narration.
- The final artifact must preserve confirmed versus inferred signals.

## Unresolved Questions
<!-- token-budget: 140 -->
- The offline pack does not fully resolve whether the shock is a brief risk premium or a longer physical disruption.

## Next Step
<!-- token-budget: 80 -->
Run the worker on the pack, then verify that chain-position logic stays stricter than headline trade logic.

## Risks / Invalidation
<!-- token-budget: 120 -->
- A neat beneficiary list could hide the difference between direct and second-order transmission.
- If no physical disruption is confirmed, freight and service names may look stronger than the evidence supports.
